This page is part of the 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids Implementation Guide (v2022.1.0: Release) based on FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) R4. This is the current published version. For a full list of available versions, see the Directory of published versions

  • Narrative Content
  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

ValueSet: CDC malignant cancer conditions

Official URL: http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/cdc-malignant-cancer-conditions Version: 2022.1.0
Active as of 2023-05-25 Computable Name: CDC_MALIGNANT_CANCER_CONDITIONS

Copyright/Legal: © CDC 2016+.

All neoplastic and malignant conditions, including pain due to neoplasm.

Cancer conditions to be used as an exclusion for opioid management review

References

This value set is not used here; it may be used elsewhere (e.g. specifications and/or implementations that use this content)

Logical Definition (CLD)

Profiles: CPGComputableValueSet, CPGExecutableValueSet

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a Section-C00-C96 (Malignant neoplasms (C00-C96))
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a D03 (Melanoma in situ)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a Section-D37-D48 (Neoplasms of uncertain behavior, polycythemia vera and myelodysplastic syndromes (D37-D48))
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a D49 (Neoplasms of unspecified behavior)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a G89.3 (Neoplasm related pain (acute) (chronic))

This value set excludes codes based on the following rules:

  • Exclude codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a D3A (Benign neuroendocrine tumors)

 

Expansion

This value set expansion contains 1,668 concepts.

http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cmFY2021  G89.3Neoplasm related pain (acute) (chronic)

Explanation of the columns that may appear on this page:

Level A few code lists that FHIR defines are hierarchical - each code is assigned a level. In this scheme, some codes are under other codes, and imply that the code they are under also applies
System The source of the definition of the code (when the value set draws in codes defined elsewhere)
Code The code (used as the code in the resource instance)
Display The display (used in the display element of a Coding). If there is no display, implementers should not simply display the code, but map the concept into their application
Definition An explanation of the meaning of the concept
Comments Additional notes about how to use the code
